description: Column schema for NADAA MVP flood-risk feature outputs. The JSON output keeps geometry as GeoJSON; the CSV output stringifies geometry.

columns.name: feature_set_version
columns.description: Version of the generated feature set.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Source family used to produce the row.

columns.name: source_updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp of the newest input fixture represented in the row.

columns.name: generated_at
columns.description: Deterministic generation timestamp for the fixture artifact.

columns.name: valid_from
columns.description: Start of the feature validity window.

columns.name: valid_to
columns.description: End of the feature validity window.

columns.name: cell_id
columns.description: Stable grid cell identifier.

columns.name: region
columns.description: Ghana region name.

columns.name: district
columns.description: District or metropolitan assembly name.

columns.name: community
columns.description: Human-readable community label for review.

columns.name: centroid_lat
columns.description: Grid centroid latitude.

columns.name: centroid_lng
columns.description: Grid centroid longitude.

columns.name: geometry
columns.description: Grid polygon geometry.

columns.name: district_geometry_source
columns.description: Provenance of district/community geometry.

columns.name: rainfall_24h_mm
columns.description: Observed rainfall aggregate over the previous 24 hours.

columns.name: rainfall_72h_mm
columns.description: Observed rainfall aggregate over the previous 72 hours.

columns.name: rainfall_forecast_24h_mm
columns.description: Rainfall forecast aggregate for the next 24 hours.

columns.name: elevation_m
columns.description: Approximate elevation above sea level.

columns.name: slope_degrees
columns.description: Approximate terrain slope.

columns.name: distance_to_drain_m
columns.description: Approximate distance from centroid to nearest drain.

columns.name: distance_to_river_m
columns.description: Approximate distance from centroid to nearest river or major waterway.

columns.name: water_level_trend_cm
columns.description: Recent water-level trend in centimeters.

columns.name: drainage_density_km_per_sq_km
columns.description: Approximate drainage density proxy.

columns.name: dominant_land_use
columns.description: Dominant land-use class.

columns.name: impervious_surface_pct
columns.description: Estimated impervious surface percentage.

columns.name: population_density_per_sq_km
columns.description: Estimated population density.

columns.name: vulnerable_population_pct
columns.description: Estimated vulnerable population share.

columns.name: historical_flood_reports_30d
columns.description: Recent flood report count in the grid area or nearby buffer.

columns.name: days_since_last_flood_report
columns.description: Days since the most recent nearby flood report, or 999 when no fixture report exists.

columns.name: inside_known_flood_zone
columns.description: Whether the cell overlaps a known flood risk zone fixture.

columns.name: low_lying_area
columns.description: Fixture terrain flag for low-lying locations.

columns.name: rainfall_intensity_score
columns.description: Normalized rainfall feature score.

columns.name: exposure_score
columns.description: Normalized exposure feature score.

columns.name: drainage_pressure_score
columns.description: Normalized drainage and terrain pressure score.

columns.name: historical_signal_score
columns.description: Normalized historical report signal score.

columns.name: composite_rule_score
columns.description: Weighted deterministic score used for Stage 0/Stage 1 bootstrapping.

columns.name: label_severity
columns.description: Fixture label derived from composite score and known zone signal.

columns.name: missing_rainfall
columns.description: True when rainfall features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_terrain
columns.description: True when terrain features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_hydrology
columns.description: True when hydrology features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_land_use
columns.description: True when land-use features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_population
columns.description: True when population features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_historical_reports
columns.description: True when historical report features were imputed or unavailable.

columns.name: missing_geometry
columns.description: True when geometry is imputed or unavailable.
